    - **Input Document:** A multi-page medical document about Hyaluronic Acid (HA) / 透明質酸 / 玻尿酸.

2.  **Scan & Extract Key Information from the Document:**
    - *Page 1:* Title/Author info: "注射用透明質酸症處理" (Injection of Hyaluronic Acid for Symptom Management/Handling), author: 張陳文 (Zhang Chenwen), Guangzhou Sun Yat-sen University Family Doctor Cosmetic Medicine. Contact info.

    - *Page 5:* Physiological sources. Synthesized in joints, etc. In skin, lasts only 3-7 days.
